description: EAD Enterprise Suite MCP — full signature workflows, certified evidence, dossiers from EAD Trust.
name: io.github.g-digital-by-Garrigues/ead-enterprise-suite

environmentVariables.description: Your GoCertius account password (See https://www.eadtrust.eu/soluciones-legaltech/enterprise-suite/ for credential acquisition.)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: OpenID Connect refresh token (See https://www.eadtrust.eu/soluciones-legaltech/enterprise-suite/ for credential acquisition.)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_OPENID_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: HTTP port when running in hosted (HTTP) mode; ignored in stdio mode
environmentVariables.name: PORT
